name: Lawrence Rossi
text_appearance: A fairly short girl (4ft 8inch) with ginger hair, with bright brown eyes and pale skin with freckles. She wears white ribbons that were a gift from her late mother. She often wears a Union gray jumpsuit, a standard mechanic's uniform with her surname embroidered above a GMS logo on the left chest. Her steel-toed work boots were notably modified with mag-clamp integration.
notes:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

>>> CAPGRAS STATUS: IDLE [I_AM_WAITING]

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Lawrence learned a lot of things in the UN Academy, but perhaps one of the more notable things that had come to her knowledge was how to use paracausal technology. Her father always told her not to trust in things she couldn't understand. Her father taught her not to rely on them if she could help it. That COMP/CON units sufficed for a lot of things. That cascades just weren't ever worth the risk. He'd seen lancers torn up and dead from cascading NHPs they once thought to be their friends. He taught her to treat NHPs well because he was well aware that they were people too, but never to fully rely on any technology or power she couldn't truly count on to keep her alive when it counts the most. Lawrence took the lesson to heart, and promised herself she wouldn't lend her control over to unknowable forces to honor her father's wishes. But, Lawrence seems to be haunted by one such unknowable force– and she doesn't know if she can keep running away from it.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


[WHO, IF I CRIED OUT, WOULD HEAR ME AMONG THE ANGELS' HIERARCHIES?

AND EVEN IF ONE OF THEM SUDDENLY PRESSED ME AGAINST HER HEART,

I WOULD PERISH IN THE EMBRACE OF HER STRONGER EXISTENCE.]
history: ﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Lawrence, born and raised in Cradle. The only daughter of Mateo Rossi and his assumed to be deceased wife Angela Rossi. A prodigal mechanical engineer with hopeful eyes and dreams for the future that Union's three core pillars promised. She grew up following her father's footsteps as someone who once worked maintenance bays for blink stations, finding it admirable that he was able to keep the universe connected and peaceful under Union rule through the simple act of lending his hands and expertise to those brave star-farers and peacekeepers that would pass him by. He'd even been able to fix up battle scarred mechs that had seen both glory and loss in equal measure, like hands that held the divine and molded it to their vision. She wanted to be a guiding star like her father. A lifeline and safeguard in the abyss, one of the many hands that held up the branches that kept the tree of union's rule aloft in the stars beyond the blue skies of cradle. That was why she went into the Union Naval Training Academy with a specialization into mechanic engineering. Now she lends her expertise to Union officially fresh after graduation.
